nodes.name: 绿宝石鹦鹉
nodes.summary: 绿宝石鹦鹉（Turquoise parrot，学名 Neophema pulchella），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联18个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括稀树草原。
nodes.shortSummary: 绿宝石鹦鹉（學名：Neophema pulchella，英語：Turquoise Parrot，台湾作青綠鸚鵡），是鸚形目舊世界鸚鵡科紐費瑪鸚鵡屬下的一種鳥類。這個物種分佈於澳洲東南部，開闊森林、林地到天然草地間的過渡帶是其最偏好的環境。因其擁有廣大的分佈範圍及數量可能正在增加…

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The turquoise parrot (Neophema pulchella) is a species of parrot in the genus Neophema native to Eastern Australia, from southeastern Queensland, through New South Wales and into North-Eastern Victoria

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: right|thumb|upright|Adult male, Twycross Zoo The turquoise parrot is found in the foothills of the Great Dividing Range and surrounding areas. The northern limit of its range is 26° south in southeastern Queensland, around Cooloola, Blackbutt and Chinchilla, extending westwards to the vicinity of St George

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In Victoria it is found in the vicinity of Wangaratta as well as East Gippsland and around Mallacoota. Sightings in South Australia are likely to have been the scarlet-chested parrot, the similar appearance of the females leading to confusion and misidentification. The turquoise parrot inhabits open woodland and savanna woodland composed either of native cypress (Callitris species) or eucalypts, particularly white box (Eucalyptus albens), yellow box ([[Eucalyptus melliodora|E
